---
name: 🧹 Chore
about: Routine maintenance, dependency updates, devops, or refactoring
title: 'chore: <short description>'
labels: ['chore']
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Goal
Provide a brief description of the goal, the background context, and what this chore accomplishes.

## 🛠️ Proposed Changes
Outline the specific modifications, cleanups, or improvements to be made.

## 🧪 Verification Plan
How will we verify that these maintenance tasks/chores have been successfully completed?
- [ ] Automated tests (e.g., CI, unit tests)
- [ ] Manual verification steps
